config.title: Lista wyboru #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50209" #include "50122" #include "50200"
dim pHS1 : set pHS1 = createobject("navocomutil.hyperset") dim g_pOrder : set g_pOrder = nothing dim g_tab:set g_tab = nothing
dim changed 'czy dane w hypersecie byly zmienione dim selected 'czy byla dokonywana selekcja z kontrolek dim deleted 'czy lista byla usunueta (??? problemy ???)
#include "50203"
'przygotowanie formularza i danych przy przejscu do nowego rekordu ' - zaladowanie listy do hypersetu ' - wyczyszczenie tabeli ktora wyswietla dane ' - ustawienie zmiennych function prepare()
set g_tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(5000)).section_body.removeall
if page_.root.eDynamic = N5CHOICELIST_DYNAMIC_ZACHOWAJ then ' todo - do poprawienia set g_pOrder = trans_.afc.new_navoarray() end if
page_.root.choicelist_load_choicelist pHS1 ', true , g_pOrder
'dim pBodyTable : set pBodyTable=page_.ctrl(5000).body 'pBodyTable.removeall()
changed=false selected=false deleted=false end function
'rzeczy robione przy opuszczaniu aktualnego rekordu ' - jezeli uzytkownik dokonywal selkcj na kontrolkach to filtrowanie hypersetu ' - jezeli zostaly dokonane jakiekolwiek zmianiy to zapis hypersetu do listy function leave() if selected=true then select_checked_elems() end if
if changed then page_.root.choicelist_save_choicelist pHS1 , g_pOrder end if
page_.ctrl(5000).hide=true end function
function fnext() leave() fnext = std_fnext() prepare() end function
function fprev() leave() fprev = std_fprev() prepare() end function
function ffirst() leave() ffirst = std_ffirst() prepare() end function
function flast() leave() flast = std_flast() prepare() end function
function fback() leave() fback=std_fback() end function
function fnew(): fnew=false leave() fnew=std_fnew() prepare() end function
function fsave leave() changed=false selected=false deleted=false fsave=std_fsave() end function
'jedynie wyswietla to co zostalo zaladowane function printlist()
if page_.root.eDynamic = N5CHOICELIST_DYNAMIC_ZACHOWAJ then clear_order_table pHS1 , g_pOrder end if
set g_tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(5000)).section_body.removeall
if (not exists_hs_element(pHS1) ) then MessageBox "Lista nie zawiera żadnych elementów" , "Brak pozycji", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function end if
dim pElem,n,pObj n=0 ' dim i,pRow,pBodyTable ' set pBodyTable=page_.ctrl(5000).body ' pBodyTable.removeall()
if deleted=false then if page_.root.eDynamic = N5CHOICELIST_DYNAMIC_ZACHOWAJ then filltablefromHS_order pHS1, 1, MAX_ELEMS , g_pOrder else filltablefromHS pHS1, 1, MAX_ELEMS end if selected=true end if
page_.ctrl(5000).hide=false end function
function moreResults()
dim pBodyTable set pBodyTable=page_.ctrl(5000).body
if page_.root.eDynamic = N5CHOICELIST_DYNAMIC_ZACHOWAJ then filltablefromHS_order pHS1, _ page_.ctrl(ID_MORE_RESULTS).userprop.prop(100), _ MAX_ELEMS , g_pOrder else filltablefromHS pHS1, _ page_.ctrl(ID_MORE_RESULTS).userprop.prop(100), _ MAX_ELEMS end if
selected=true end function
'zdarzenia nacisniecia przycisku wyczyszczenia listy function clearlist()
if (exists_hs_element(pHS1)) then if MessageBox("Lista wybory zawiera elementy. Jesteś pewien, że chcesz ją wyczyścić?", "Wyczyścić listę?", vbYesNo, vbQuestion)<>vbYes then exit function end if end if
'usuniecie zawartości listy pHS1.empty() while page_.root.listElement.exists(1) page_.root.listElement.delete(1) wend
'wyczyszczenie tabeli wyswietlającej dane dim pBodyTable : set pBodyTable=page_.ctrl(5000).body pBodyTable.removeall()
'ustawienie zmiennych changed=true 'lista została zmieniona deleted=true 'zostala usunięta (???) selected=false 'nie dokonano selekcji
page_.ctrl(5000).hide=true end function
dim pOperacjeKontener
'kontener wizzarda dla sumy, iloczyny i różnicy class COperacjaContainer public nTypOperacji '1-suma 2-iloczyn 3-różnica public strOperacji public pListaB 'nowo wybrany zbior public pListaA 'aktualny zbior public nTypeId
private sub Class_Initialize() nTypOperacji=clng(1) strOperacji="" set pListaB=nothing nTypeId=page_.root.nTypeId
set pListaA=page_.root end sub
end class
function WizzardRun() set pOperacjeKontener=new COperacjaContainer
dim pWizzard set pWizzard=CWizzard(false)
pWizzard.add_step 20316 pWizzard.add_step 20318 pWizzard.add_step 20317 pWizzard.add_step 20319
pWizzard.add_container pOperacjeKontener
pWizzard.run end function
function onPageExit(pWizzardPage) onPageExit=PAGE_DEFAULT
select case ( pWizzardPage.m_nPage ) case 20318 if (pWizzardPage.m_pContainer.pListaB is nothing) then MessageBox "Musisz wybrać listę wyboru (zbiór) B" , "Wybór", vbOKOnly, vbInformation onPageExit=PAGE_DONOTEXIT end if end select
end function
function onWizzardComplete(pWizzardPage): onWizzardComplete=false
dim pListB dim pHS2
dim pOrder:set pOrder = nothing if page_.root.eDynamic = N5CHOICELIST_DYNAMIC_ZACHOWAJ then ' todo - do poprawienia set pOrder = trans_.afc.new_navoarray() end if
set pListB = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_CHOICELIST,pWizzardPage.m_pContainer.pListaB.IdObj) set pHS2=createobject("navocomutil.hyperset") pListB.choicelist_load_choicelist pHS2 ', false , pOrder
dim strOperacja
select case pWizzardPage.m_pContainer.nTypOperacji case 1 'suma select_checked_elems() 'selekcja z kontrolek set pHS1 = pHS1.or(pHS2)'suma hypersetów strOperacja="sumy" dim iter if not pOrder is nothing then for iter = 0 to pOrder.UpperIndex() g_pOrder.add pOrder.value(iter) next end if
case 2 'iloczyn set pHS1 = pHS1.and(pHS2) strOperacja="iloczynu"
case 3 'roznica set pHS1 = pHS1.minus(pHS2) strOperacja="roznicy"
end select
'clear_order_table pHS1 , g_pOrder
changed=true selected=false deleted=false
pWizzardPage.m_pPage.activate MessageBox "Operacja " + strOperacja + " na listach wyboru została wykonana." , "Operacja wykonana", vbOKOnly, vbInformation
dim pBodyTable : set pBodyTable=page_.ctrl(5000).body pBodyTable.removeall() printlist()
onWizzardComplete=true end function
function fopen()
page_.topelement.title="Lista wyboru - " + CStr( doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(page_.root.nTypeID).HumanName )
page_.ctrl(5000).hide=true
'ustawiamy userprop by pamietac na jakim elemencie 'skonczylismy wyswietlanie set page_.ctrl(ID_MORE_RESULTS).userprop=doc_.createhli() page_.ctrl(ID_MORE_RESULTS).userprop.prop(100)=CLng(0)
if not page_.root.isnew then prepare() end if end function
function countVisibleElems() countVisibleElems=(page_.ctrl(ID_MORE_RESULTS).userprop.prop(100)-1) end function
function filllist()
if page_.root.eDynamic = N5CHOICELIST_DYNAMIC_ZACHOWAJ then clear_order_table pHS1 , g_pOrder end if
'wybieramy jeden z raportow dla danego typu obiektow dim strSQLWhere,nIdObj,pPM strSQLWhere = "ResultTypeId = " + CStr(page_.root.nTypeId)
trans_.var(APPVAR_SEARCH_TYPEID) = page_.root.nTypeID ' to gdyby komus zachcialo dodawac sie nowego raportu :) trans_.var(APPVAR_SEARCH_KIND) = "S"
nIdObj = fire_choice_list(TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE,"Sposób wypełniania","Nazwa",strSQLWhere,"","")
'wyswietlamy raport if nIdObj>0 then 'jesli zostal jakis wybrany
dim i,pSearchTypeObj set pSearchTypeObj = trans_.getObj(TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE,nIdObj) if pSearchTypeObj is nothing then exit function ' jest lock i nie mozemy go dostac... end if
set pPM = doc_.getmodule(60114) dim strButtons: strButtons = "Wypełnij listę" dim strColumns, strJoin, strWhere, strOrderBy, strGroupBy, strDescription, strIds
' pobierz kryteria wyszukiwania dim nRes: nRes = pPM.get_search_filter_result(pSearchTypeObj, strButtons, strColumns, strJoin, strWhere, strOrderBy, strGroupBy, strDescription, strIds) if nRes<>1 then exit function
dim pPM60115 set pPM60115 = doc_.getmodule(60115)
'tworzymy kursor i wrzucamy dane z niego do listy dim cursor,pCr,pElem set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor (page_.root.nTypeId, strWhere,strOrderBy, pPM60115.trim_first_join(strJoin) ) for each pCr in cursor pHS1.add page_.root.nTypeId , pCr.IdObj if page_.root.eDynamic = N5CHOICELIST_DYNAMIC_ZACHOWAJ then g_pOrder.add clng(pCr.IdObj) end if changed=true selected=false deleted=false next end if
end function
'wyswietlanie zawartosci z zachowaniwm kolejnnosci 'tablica pOrder zawiera elementy w kolejnosci takiej jak 'w liscie function filltablefromHS_order(pHS, byval nStartElem, byval nOfElems , byval pOrder)
clear_order_table pHS , pOrder
dim pHS_printed : set pHS_printed = createobject("navocomutil.hyperset")
dim ii,hi,lo,iCtrl,p iCtrl = MIN_CTRL_INDEX
dim i,pObj,pHli
'if g_tab is nothing then ' set g_tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(5000)).section_body.removeall 'end if
p = count_hs_elems(pHS)
i = 1
dim iter for iter=0 to pOrder.UpperIndex() if (i>=nStartElem) then
if pHS.exists(page_.root.nTypeId , clng(pOrder.value(iter)) ) and not pHS_printed.exists(page_.root.nTypeId , clng(pOrder.value(iter)) ) then ' teraz sprawdzimy czy istnieje element w hs i nie zostal juz wydrukowany...
pHS_printed.add page_.root.nTypeId,clng(pOrder.value(iter))
set pObj = trans_.getobj(page_.root.nTypeId,clng(pOrder.value(iter))) g_tab.newrow
if (i mod 2) = 0 then g_tab.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN end if
set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(GVAR_IDOBJ_VAR) = pObj.idObj page_add_checkbox g_tab , pObj.text , iCtrl + i page_.ctrl(iCtrl + i).value="1" set page_.ctrl(iCtrl + i).userprop = pHli
end if
end if
i=i+1 if (i=(nOfElems+nStartElem)) then exit for end if
next
'pokaz lub ukryj "Pokaż więcej . . . ." if (p>=i) then page_.ctrl(ID_MORE_RESULTS).hide=false else page_.ctrl(ID_MORE_RESULTS).hide=true end if
'ustaw na, ktorym elemencie skonczylismy page_.ctrl(ID_MORE_RESULTS).userprop.prop(100)=CLng(i) end function
'wyswietlanie zawartosci function filltablefromHS(pHS, byval nStartElem, byval nOfElems)
dim ii,hi,lo,iCtrl,p iCtrl = MIN_CTRL_INDEX
dim i,pObj,pHli
p = count_hs_elems(pHS)
i = 1 for each ii in pHS
'wyswietlamy elementy tylko z podanego zakresu if (i>=nStartElem) then pHS.extract ii, hi, lo set pObj = trans_.getobj(hi,lo)
g_tab.newrow
if (i mod 2) = 0 then g_tab.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN end if
set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(GVAR_IDOBJ_VAR) = pObj.idObj page_add_checkbox g_tab , pObj.text , iCtrl + i page_.ctrl(iCtrl + i).value="1" set page_.ctrl(iCtrl + i).userprop = pHli
end if
i=i+1
if (i=(nOfElems+nStartElem)) then exit for end if next
'pokaz lub ukryj "Pokaż więcej . . . ." if (p>=i) then page_.ctrl(ID_MORE_RESULTS).hide=false else page_.ctrl(ID_MORE_RESULTS).hide=true end if
'ustaw na, ktorym elemencie skonczylismy page_.ctrl(ID_MORE_RESULTS).userprop.prop(100)=CLng(i) end function
'czyscimy tablice kolejnosci elementow z zbednych rzeczy function clear_order_table(byref pHS , byref pTable)
dim elem,lo,hi dim iter for iter = 0 to pTable.upperindex 'jezeli element nie istnieje w HS to wypieprzamy go z tablicy if not pHS.exists(page_.root.nTypeID , pTable.value(iter)) then pTable.remove(iter) iter = iter - 1 end if next end function
'zwraca ilosc elementow listy function count_list_elems() dim pElement,count count=0 for each pElement in page_.root.listElement count=count+1 next count_list_elems=count end function
'zwraca ilosc elementow hyperseta function count_hs_elems(pHS) dim ii,count count=0 for each ii in pHS count=count+1 next count_hs_elems=count end function
function exists_hs_element(pHS): exists_hs_element=false dim ii, count for each ii in pHS exists_hs_element=true exit for next end function
'wybranie tylko tych elementow, przy ktorych checkobxy sa zaznaczone function select_checked_elems() dim i,j, iCtrl,pHli,p
iCtrl = MIN_CTRL_INDEX + 1 i = count_hs_elems(pHS1) - 1 p= countVisibleElems()
if selected = true then for j=iCtrl to (iCtrl + p - 1) if not page_.trygetctrl(j) is nothing then set pHli = page_.ctrl(j).userprop if page_.ctrl(j).value = 0 then pHS1.remove page_.root.nTypeId , pHli.prop(GVAR_IDOBJ_VAR) changed=true end if end if next end if end function
function select_object_type() dim pm : set pm = doc_.getmodule(60113) dim nTypeID nTypeID = pm.select_object() page_.root.nTypeId=nTypeID end function
sub page_add_checkbox(byref tab, byval strText , nId ) tab.newcell.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX, clng(nID)).element.border = 0 tab.element.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC, -1).text = strText end sub
function uncheckall dim i for i= MIN_CTRL_INDEX to MIN_CTRL_INDEX + countVisibleElems() if not page_.trygetctrl(i) is nothing then page_.ctrl(i).value = "0" changed=true selected=true deleted=true end if next end function
function reversecheck dim i for i= MIN_CTRL_INDEX to MIN_CTRL_INDEX + countVisibleElems() if not page_.trygetctrl(i) is nothing then changed=true selected=true deleted=true if page_.ctrl(i).value = "1" then page_.ctrl(i).value = "0" else page_.ctrl(i).value = "1" end if end if next end function
function fcopy(byval nFormat,byref pDS) 'przenis wszystkie zmiany do bazy ale nie zapisuj 'zmain - robimy tylko na potrzeby kopiowania leave() changed=false selected=false deleted=false
'wykonaj standardowe kopiowanie fcopy = doc_.getmodule(nFormat).std_copy(page_,pDS) end function
function fpaste(byval nFormat,byref pSS) 'wklej wszystko do bazy fpaste = doc_.getmodule(nFormat).std_paste(page_,pSS) 'zaladuj do hypersetu prepare() end function
function c8_ongetdata(ctrl) if page_.root.nUser = 0 then ctrl.value="0" else ctrl.value="1" end if c8_ongetdata = true end function
function c8_ondataentered(ctrl, value) if value then page_.root.nUser = clng(getCurrentUserID()) else page_.root.nUser = clng(0) end if
c8_ondataentered = true end function
function c40_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c40_ongetdata=true oCtrl.value=cstr(page_.root.nIsSecurity) end function
function c40_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) page_.root.nIsSecurity = clng(newValue) c40_ondataentered=true end function
